title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Asian Paints Signature Store - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
